markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on Logic's strategic pivot and its impact on content.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Logic is shifting focus to CTOs/VPs of Engineering, a persona proven more receptive to the product. The new messaging will frame Logic as a simpler alternative to complex AI frameworks (e.g., LangChain) and custom builds.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [**Content Pause:** New content production will pause after this week's articles to avoid creating misaligned assets. GrowthX will use the interim to research the new persona and prepare for the strategy shift.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [**Technical Fixes:** A critical bug is preventing Logic Flows from rendering on live articles. Azzam will escalate to Steve for an urgent fix.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [**AEO Strategy:** Azzam is planning a 90-day AI Engine Optimization (AEO) sprint for early 2025, which will include a faster content refresh cadence (3-6 months) and exploration of flagship "hero content" pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Pivot: CTOs & AI

  - [**Rationale:** The product resonates more effectively with CTOs and technical CEOs than with the original business-user target.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [**Messaging Shift:**](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
      - [**From:** Automating decisions alongside tools like Zapier.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
      - [**To:** A simpler alternative to complex AI frameworks (e.g., LangChain) and custom development.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [**Decision Points (due EOD Nov 26):**](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [**Audience:** Full pivot to engineers vs. a dual-audience approach.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [**Positioning:** The specific problem Logic solves and its competitive framing.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [**Impact on Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
      - [**Keywords:** Shift from automation to AI-related terms.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
      - [**Competitive Framing:** Shift from workflow tools (N8N, Zapier) to AI frameworks (LangChain).](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)

### Content Strategy & Execution

  - [**Pause New Content:** Production will pause after this week's articles to prevent creating misaligned assets.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [**Interim Focus:** GrowthX will use the pause to research the new persona and prepare for the strategy shift.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [**Knowledge Transfer:** Bailey will send a questionnaire to guide Azzam's "brain dump" document, which will provide the context needed to build new persona documents and conduct keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)

### Technical & Platform Updates

  - [**Logic Flows Bug:** A critical bug is preventing Logic Flows from rendering on live articles.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [**Impact:** Creates an "ugly, sore section" in the middle of posts.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Azzam will escalate to Steve today for an urgent fix.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [**Schema & Automation:** Azzam is working with Steve to enable schema (e.g., `last modified date`) for blog posts and landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
      - [**Significance:** This is a prerequisite for GrowthX to automate publishing directly from their system, eliminating the manual ops step.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)

### Future AEO & Content Initiatives

  - [**AEO Sprint (Jan 2025):** A 90-day sprint to optimize for LLMs, covering landing pages, YouTube, Reddit, G2, and editorial mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [**Faster Refresh Cadence:** To support AEO, the content refresh cadence will accelerate from the standard 6-12 months to 3-6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [**"Hero Content" Exploration:** Azzam is interested in creating flagship research pieces with original data.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
      - [**GrowthX Role:** GrowthX can advise on strategy and format. Production support is TBD; Jakub will check with the client ops team.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [**Webinar Content:** Logic's Dec 4 webinar will be repurposed into video snippets and FAQs for future content.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Azzam:**](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [Escalate Logic Flows bug to Steve (due Nov 26).](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [Provide a decision on the strategic pivot and a detailed write-up (due by next Wednesday).](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [Grant GrowthX access to Scrunch (due Nov 26).](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [Share webinar assets post-event.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
      - [Send persona/strategy questionnaire to Azzam (due Nov 26).](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
      - [Check with client ops on capacity for "hero content" production.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [Pause new content production after this week's articles.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [Use the interim to research the new persona and prepare for the strategy shift.](https://fathom.video/share/o92XXMfLeL4gXp_R1sfsrPgK_YuPjc1t?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
